title: Design system: Neubrutalism tokens and primitives from Stitch exports
description: design-system-agent normalizes Editorial Neubrutalism Modern Curator tokens (typography roles, seed orange #FF5F1F, strokes, shadows, radii) and shared atoms/molecules intent from projects/todo-reference/design/stitch/ exports and 07 artifacts/design_package.json. Writes design_system.json (and updates design_package.json references.design_system) under the same artifact root owned by 07; no Stitch regeneration.
acceptance: artifacts/design_system.json exists under projects/todo-reference/tasks/todo-mvp/07-ui-generator-stitch-four-screens/artifacts/ (or path referenced by design_package.json references.design_system) with token roles aligned to brief: Newsreader, Plus Jakarta Sans, Space Grotesk; no Material-default visual language.

design_package.json references.design_system is non-null and points to the file with portable relative paths; design_package.json status advanced appropriately (e.g. tokens_applied or workflow state per team convention).
Outputs are traceable to the four exported screens (no unconstrained new layout; primitives support all four routes).
implementation_notes: design_system.json authored; globals/tokens wired in src/styles/tokens.css and next/font in root layout.
